title: Rotate eight doors and eight spirits by declared dun direction

sources.locator: 值使随时支 and 符从甲去寻时干，使索时支遁处止
systems/qimen/full_chart.py nine-palace duty-door walk and eight-ring hosting policy

notes: The duty door walks all nine Lo Shu palace numbers. A logical center landing is disclosed and hosted in Kun palace 2 for the displayed eight-door ring.
